author: doll-agent
content: Add Serialize/Deserialize for StringArray<D> in new src/serde_impl.rs, mirroring ferray-core's array/serde_impl pattern. Format: { 'shape': [...], 'data': [...] } with strings in row-major order. Deserialize validates rank against D::NDIM and rebuilds the dimension via D::from_dim_slice. Add serde to ferray-strings deps and serde_json to dev-deps. 6 tests covering 1D, 2D, IxDyn round-trips plus unicode multi-byte, rank mismatch, and size mismatch errors.
